choices: Upon the Distinction of the Ashes of the Various Tobaccos

questions.q: In 'The Adventure of the Speckled Band', what is the connection between the mysterious whistles and Dr. Grimesby Roylott's crimes?

They are used to hypnotize his victims before poisoning them

They summon a trained swamp adder through a ventilation passage

questions.q: Which London location, besides Baker Street, served as a frequent meeting place for Holmes and his clients according to the original stories?

questions.q: In 'A Scandal in Bohemia', what incriminating item does Irene Adler possess that the King of Bohemia desperately wants recovered?

A document revealing the King's illegitimate child

questions.q: In the original canon, Holmes demonstrates his knowledge of tobacco ash by cataloguing how many distinct varieties?

questions.q: What is the address of Mrs. Hudson's boarding house where Holmes resides in the original stories?

choices: 'Sherlock Holmes and the Mystery of the Crown Jewels'

questions.q: In 'The Adventure of the Noble Bachelor', what scandalous secret does Lord Robert St. Simon's bride conceal before their wedding?
choices: She was an actress using a false identity
She had committed a crime in her past
She was already married to someone else
She had previously been engaged to an American
